overview.description: The FT Vest U.S. Equity Max Buffer ETF - May (MAYM) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in downside hedge alternatives. The fund seeks to provide a pre-determined investment outcome over a one year period. The exposure is reset annually in May MAYM was launched on May 16, 2025 and is issued by First Trust.
